/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/ConsoleManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/MainConsole.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/Process.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/Scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/Screen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/instructions/IAdd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/instructions/IDeclare.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/instructions/IFor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/instructions/IPrint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/instructions/ISleep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/instructions/ISubtract.cpp.o -o app
